id.description:
The identifier of the option exercise.

Note: It is possible for this ID to not exist for legacy reasons, in which case the value of this field will be `"NO_ID"`

issuerId.description: The identifier of the issuer that issued the option grant.

stakeholderId.description: The identifier of the stakeholder that holds the option grant being exercised.
stakeholderId.title: The identifier of the stakeholder that holds the option grant being exercised

optionGrantId.description: The identifier of the option grant being exercised.

certificateId.description: The identifier of the certificate issued as a result of the option exercise event completing.

value.description:
A decimal amount represented in string form.

Examples:
0
0.0
1.00
123.45
-456.0
.321
+1.23456e-3
1e-05
value.title: value

quantity.description: A string-based representation of the decimal type.

exerciseTime.description: A complete calendar UTC date and time defined as per the ISO 8601 standard.

state.description:
Enumeration of option exercise request state types.

 - AWAITING_TAX_WITHHOLDING: The exercise is created but does not have tax withholding information yet.
 - PENDING: The exercise request is pending.
 - COMPLETE: The exercise request is complete.
 - CANCELED: The exercise request is canceled.

exerciseType.description:
Enumeration of option exercise types.

 - CASH_EXERCISE: The cost of exercise was covered in cash.
 - CASHLESS_EXERCISE: The cost of exercise was covered by selling shares.
 - NET_EXERCISE: The cost of exercise was covered by withholding shares.
 - BLENDED: The cost of exercise was covered by a combination of cash and selling of shares.

recordType.description:
Enumeration of stock option grant types.

 - ISO: The stock options are incentive stock options (ISOs).
 - NSO: The stock options are non-qualified stock options (NSOs).
 - OTHER: The stock options are neither ISOs nor NSOs.

name.description: The name of the tax withholding line item.

Examples:

123.45

.321
+1.23456e-3
1e-05
value.title: value

rate.description: A string-based representation of the decimal type.

currencyCode.description: A three-letter alphabetic currency code defined by the ISO 4217 standard.

amount.description: A string-based representation of the decimal type.

taxes.description: Represents an amount of money with its currency type.

city.description: The city used to calculate tax withholding.

countrySubdivision.description: Codes identifying the principal subdivisions of countries as defined by the [ISO 3166-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2) standard.

country.description: Three letter country codes as defined by the [ISO 3166-1 alpha-3](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1-alpha-3) standard.

jurisdiction.description:
Jurisdiction used to calculate tax withholding is calculated.
Either the name of the city, country subdivision, or country used to calculate tax withholding.

items.description: Tax withholding information for an option exercise, calculated for a specific jurisdiction for a given stakeholder.

taxWithholding.description: The tax withholding information associated with the option exercise.

completionDate.description: A complete calendar UTC date and time defined as per the ISO 8601 standard.

moneyMovement.description: Information about the the funding of an option exercise.

description: An option exercise is an event representing a stakeholder exercising their right to purchase shares of an issuer at a set price, the strike price, defined in the option grant being exercised. The result of a successfully completed exercise is the issuance of a certificate.
